base_prompt_prefix: masterpiece, best quality, very aesthetic, 2d game asset, clean readable silhouette, crisp dark outline, bright fantasy RPG style, centered subject, simple shape language, game-ready icon readability
negative_prompt: nsfw, lowres, text, watermark, logo, signature, username, blurry, cropped, cut off, jpeg artifacts, worst quality, low quality, unfinished, extra digits, abstract, photorealistic, realistic photo, messy background

camera_rules.item_icon: centered single object, no hand, no character, no scenery
camera_rules.skill_icon: centered readable magic effect symbol, no text
camera_rules.character_sprite: single full-body character, top-down three-quarter game view
